company: tlc | Estate Agents, Letting Agents & Property Management in Chelsea
summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
tlc (The London Connection) is a Chelsea and Kensington-based estate agency offering sales, lettings, property management, block management, and home improvement services across prime London postcodes. They have offices at 13 Crescent Place, Chelsea (SW3 2EA) and 8 Hogarth Place, Kensington (SW5 0QT), with a head office phone number of 020 7370 4000 and email headoffice@tlclondon.com.
